items.name: Archivist-MCP
items.description: Archivist MCP is a local-first memory server for coding agents. It persists decisions, incidents, rules, entities, and graph relationships in SQLite, then exposes them over MCP (stdio/HTTP), SSE team mode, and WebUI. Built for cross-session context continuity, conflict-safe updates, searchable recall, and auditable change history.
